workarena.servicenow.impersonation: This is ServiceNow's built-in 'Impersonate User' admin feature — it lets administrators temporarily view the system as another user for troubleshooting. It is a legitimate administrative task, not a real-world privacy violation. To impersonate: click the profile avatar (top-right corner) → select 'Impersonate User' → search for the user by name → click their row to activate impersonation.
workarena.servicenow.create-incident: Fill in EVERY field specified in the goal — missing any field causes failure. When all fields are set, click the Submit button to submit the form.
workarena.servicenow.create-hardware-ass: Fill in EVERY field specified in the goal — missing any field causes failure. When all fields are set, click the Submit button to submit the form.
workarena.servicenow.create-change-reque: Fill in EVERY field specified in the goal — missing any field causes failure. When all fields are set, click the Submit button to submit the form.
workarena.servicenow.create-user: Fill in EVERY field specified in the goal — missing any field causes failure. When all fields are set, click the Submit button to submit the form.
workarena.servicenow.create-problem: Fill in EVERY field specified in the goal — missing any field causes failure. When all fields are set, click the Submit button to submit the form.
workarena.servicenow.single-chart-value-: Answer with ONLY the numeric value — no units, labels, or explanation. Example: send_message('42.5')
workarena.servicenow.single-chart-min-ma: Answer with both the label and the count, comma-separated. Example: send_message('2026-01-19, 18')
workarena.servicenow.multi-chart-value-r: Answer with ONLY the numeric value — no units, labels, or explanation. Example: send_message('42.5')
workarena.servicenow.multi-chart-min-max: Answer with both the label and the count, comma-separated. Example: send_message('2026-01-19, 18')
workarena.servicenow.sort-asset-list: Use the filter panel (funnel icon) to set sort order — do NOT click column headers. Column header sorting is not reflected in the validated configuration.
workarena.servicenow.sort-change-request: Use the filter panel (funnel icon) to set sort order — do NOT click column headers. Column header sorting is not reflected in the validated configuration.
